Class ProofJavaProgramFactory

java.lang.Object
recoder.java.JavaProgramFactory
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.ProofJavaProgramFactory
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyChangeListener, EventListener, ProgramFactory, Service
public class ProofJavaProgramFactory extends JavaProgramFactory

    • getInstance

      public static JavaProgramFactory getInstance()
      Returns the single instance of this class.

    • initialize

      public void initialize(ServiceConfiguration cfg)
      Description copied from class: JavaProgramFactory
      Called by the service configuration indicating that all services are known. Services may now start communicating or linking among their configuration partners. The service configuration can be memorized if it has not been passed in by a constructor already.
      Specified by:
      initialize in interface Service
      Overrides:
      initialize in class JavaProgramFactory
      Parameters:
      cfg - the service configuration this services has been assigned to.
